semver.description: Semantic version of the capture bundle contract (schemas + codegen).

uuid.description: RFC 4122 UUID in lowercase canonical form.

timestamp_ns.description: Unsigned integer nanoseconds since Unix epoch (1970-01-01T00:00:00Z) as a decimal string. JSON strings preserve full uint64 range without IEEE-754 loss.

rfc3339_utc_z.description: RFC 3339 timestamp in UTC with Zulu suffix (no numeric offset forms).

uri_safe.description: Human- or machine-readable identifier; not validated as a full URI unless noted.

vec3.description: 3-vector in floating point. Frame is documented per stream (see COORDINATE_SYSTEMS_AND_TIME.md).

quat_xyzw.description: Unit quaternion (x, y, z, w) in Hamilton convention for active rotation v' = q * v * q⁻¹.

bundle_lifecycle.description: High-level lifecycle of the on-device bundle directory. See docs/BUNDLE_SPECIFICATION.md.
